summary: Issue #470 P2-9-8 budgeted multi-bucket orchestrator: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. Orchestrator composes partition runners with injectable run_partition, skip-complete, budget pause (stopped_reason=budget), bucket allowlist, shop_id isolation, CLI arg validation, and MODULE.md operator command. Nine unit tests pass with mocked partition runners; no live Partner HTTP. Path-disjoint from sibling partition modules; no migrations or repos schema changes.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: MODULE.md documents orchestrator API, operator CLI snippet, and budget≠partition-complete contract.
criticalFindings.suggestion: No action required — documentation matches module style.

criticalFindings.description: CLI validates operator args only; production partition wiring remains programmatic via injected run_partition until worker attaches TikTok resources.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Wire partition runners in worker/ops entrypoint when scheduling backfill jobs.

interfaceChanges.description: Multi-bucket orchestrator loop with budget pause and skip-complete semantics.

mappings.criterion: two run simulation resumes without refetching completed
shop id required second shop isolation partitions
validate buckets rejects ads forbidden paths
operator command documented parses shop dates
no live partner http unit tests
